prompt: I need a social media management tool for my 3-person marketing team. We post on Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok. Budget is $150/month total.
assertions: Eliminates per-seat tools that would exceed budget for 3 users like Sprout Social
Recommends at least two affordable alternatives with reasoning for each
Considers whether the tool supports all three networks mentioned

prompt: How do I set up a content calendar and batch workflow so my team stops scrambling to post last-minute?
assertions: Describes a batch content creation process with a regular cadence like weekly or bi-weekly
Covers posting frequency recommendations per social network
Mentions queue-based scheduling or optimal send time features

prompt: My CEO wants to know the ROI of our social media efforts. How do I build a report?
assertions: Covers UTM tracking for attributing website traffic to social posts
Recommends key metrics that matter to executives like engagement rate, traffic, and conversions
Suggests connecting social data to business outcomes rather than just vanity metrics
